the quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog and the slow black cat sleeps near the warm window
vraxion builds instnct as a self wiring graph and the rust beta runner should always emit a report
language evolution here is a smoke fixture only and not a claim of breakthrough or final theory
the runner must complete write metrics write summary and keep the public beta surface reproducible
